About

The eye
behind the
quiet

I'm Shalom Nganga — a photographer and frontend developer based in Nairobi, Kenya. I shoot with my phone and edit in Lightroom Mobile, finding beauty in the city most people walk past without noticing.

My work focuses on urban Nairobi — the skylines, the roads, the spaces between buildings, and the light that changes everything.

Available for commissions, content creation and licensing.

📍 Nairobi, Kenya  ·  Available for hire
